construction_strategy: 1. Create a base extrusion of 60mm x 40mm to a height of 30mm. 2. Create a sketch on the top face. 3. Define a rectangular pocket or text geometry for 'ПРОБА'. 4. Perform a cut operation to a depth of 1.2mm.
overall_shape: Solid rectangular prism with a shallow rectangular recess on the top face containing embossed/cut text.
title: 3D printing test part - recessed text block

uncertainties.description: Exact horizontal and vertical coordinates for the text/pocket center are not dimensioned; assumed centered on top face.
Font type and size are not specified; inferred from visual representation.
The outer dimensions of the gray 'recessed pocket' area are not explicitly dimensioned, only its depth.

views.description: Cross-section showing the 1.2mm depth of the recess
